productDisplayName: Nike Men Arsenal Navy Blue Jersey
description: CompositionNavy blue Arsenal jersey made of 100% recycled polyester Dri Fit fabric in a mesh finish, that has navy blue ribbed round neckline, short navy blue sleeves with light blue rubber print stripe from the shoulder till the middle of the short sleeves, front panel that has a diagonal line that separates the front into navy blue and lighter blue, Arsenal badge on the upper left chest in rubber print, swoosh logo embroidered on the upper right chest, Fly Emirates written in rubber print below the swoosh and the seal and Arsenal printed on the back below the collar in rubber printFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron Do not dry cleanLine dryThe Arsenal Jersey from nike pays tribute to the “Great Innovator's”. Distinctive design details and breathability offer comfort both on and off the field. Lightweight and breathable, the Arsenal Jersey was designed with the environment in mind. Its sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from 100% recycled polyester. Team this jersey with jeans or with tracks and cleats while out playing football with friends.
